deep_dive.title: Symbol Rate-Code Rate Trade-offs for IM/DD 200G/400G per Lane LPO Transceivers
deep_dive.abstract: We analyze the symbol rate-code rate trade-off in bandwidth-limited IM/DD systems targeting LPO transceivers, using PAM-4/6/8 as candidate modulation formats. We use the capacity of the binary symmetric channel as an achievable information rate under hard-decision decoding, serving as a performance metric for 200G and 400G per-lane throughput targets. Our results show that reducing the FEC code rate below the KP4 baseline allows higher-order PAM formats to operate at substantially lower symbol rates than PAM-4 while meeting the throughput requirement.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: analysis of symbol rate and code rate trade-offs for high-speed IM/DD LPO transceivers using PAM modulation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 高速IM/DD LPO收发器的符号率与编码率折衷分析
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 高速IM/DD LPO收发器的符号率与编码率折衷分析
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 高速IM/DD LPO收发器的符号率与编码率折衷分析
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper analyzes the symbol rate-code rate trade-off in bandwidth-limited IM/DD systems for 200G/400G per lane LPO transceivers, showing that reducing FEC code rate allows higher-order PAM formats to operate at lower symbol rates.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对带宽受限的IM/DD系统，分析了符号率与编码率之间的折衷关系，面向每通道200G/400G的LPO收发器，采用PAM-4/6/8调制格式。研究表明，将FEC编码率降低到KP4基线以下，可以使高阶PAM格式以远低于PAM-4的符号率运行，同时满足吞吐量要求。这为高速SerDes和HBM接口的信道设计提供了重要参考。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对带宽受限的IM/DD系统，分析了符号率与编码率之间的折衷关系，面向每通道200G/400G的LPO收发器，采用PAM-4/6/8调制格式。研究表明，将FEC编码率降低到KP4基线以下，可以使高阶PAM格式以远低于PAM-4的符号率运行，同时满足吞吐量要求。这为高速SerDes和HBM接口的信道设计提供了重要参考。
